Bus Timings

Bus 23 Timings Oud Metha Bus Station to Al Nahda 1, DEWA and Return

July 23, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

If you’re looking to get around Dubai without breaking a sweat, Bus 23 has got you covered. It runs between Oud Metha Bus Station and Al Nahda 1, DEWA, hitting up all sorts of spots along the way. You’ve got your residential areas, shopping hubs, and even some of Dubai’s must-see landmarks.

Whether you’re rushing to work, hunting for bargains, or just out to explore the city, Bus 23 is your trusty steed. It’s a lifesaver for folks who need to zip across town without the hassle of driving. Trust me, this route is a game-changer for daily commuters and tourists alike.

Route Name 23
Route Description Oud Metha Bus Station · 7 - Al Nahda 1, DEWA - Oud Metha Bus Station · 7
Total Distance Approximately 15 to 22.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 45 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 t0 01:00 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 23

Bus 23 Route in Dubai

Bus 23 Timetable

To see the full schedule, you can visit the RTA’s official site, or check this link for Bus 23 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 23 is AED 3, providing an economical option for passengers traveling across the entire route. This affordable pricing makes Bus 23 a practical choice for daily commutes or occasional trips throughout Dubai. Additionally, the cost-effectiveness of this fare allows for frequent use without straining your budget, making it a great choice for regular travelers.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 23 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates and scheduling information, using the RTA Dubai app or visiting the official website is recommended. This ensures that you have the latest details and can plan your journey effectively.

Bus Route

  1. Oud Metha Bus Station · 7

  2. Umm Hurair, Road, 2

  3. City Centre Metro · 2

  4. DNATA

  5. Ministry Of Environment

  6. Al Bakhit Center

  7. Hamarain Center

  8. The Center

  10. Hor Al Anz, Turnoff

  11. Abu Hail, Clinic

  12. Manama

  13. Abu Hail, Masjid

  14. Century Mall

  15. Wuhaida, Road

  16. Sama Residence

  17. Mattar Plaza

  18. Al Nahda 1, DEWA

  19. LuLu Hypermarket

  20. Stadium Bus Station · 6

  21. Shabab Al Ahli Club

  22. Wuhaida, Road

Bus 23 Station Overview

Oud Metha Bus Station · 7

This bus station is well-equipped with essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule updates.

Its location in a bustling neighborhood ensures easy access to various local services and commercial establishments. The station efficiently manages a high volume of passengers and provides convenient connections to other parts of the city, making it an important component of the local transportation network.

Hor Al Anz, Turnoff 1 Bus Stop Intersection

The Hor Al Anz, Turnoff 1 Bus Stop is a major transit hub where Bus Routes 5, 23, 64, 13B, 13D, and C18 intersect. This central location provides passengers with efficient connections between these diverse routes, facilitating seamless travel across various parts of Dubai. The stop’s strategic placement ensures easy access to multiple destinations, making it a crucial point for commuters navigating the Hor Al Anz area.

Intersecting Bus Routes at Abu Hail Clinic 1

This strategic location offers seamless connections between these routes, providing comprehensive travel options for passengers across various parts of Dubai. The intersection’s connectivity facilitates easy transfers and enhances accessibility for commuters traveling within the city, making it a central hub for efficient public transportation.

Al Nahda 1, DEWA

Al Nahda 1, DEWA is a strategically located bus station in the Al Nahda 1 area, near the Dubai Electricity and Water Authority (DEWA) office.

Its proximity to a major utility office adds to its importance, catering to both residents and visitors in the area. The station plays a crucial role in connecting passengers to various bus routes and facilitating smooth transit across Dubai, enhancing accessibility to local amenities and services.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Along the route of Bus 23 in Dubai, several notable tourist attractions and destinations can be found: 1.

  1. Dubai Folklore Theatre: Found near the Shabab Al Ahli Club stop, this venue offers traditional cultural performances and exhibitions, showcasing Dubai’s rich heritage.

  2. LuLu Hypermarket: Situated at Al Nahda 1, DEWA stop, this hypermarket is a popular shopping destination for groceries, household items, and electronics.

  3. Century Mall: Positioned along the route, this mall provides a variety of shopping and dining options, making it a convenient stop for retail therapy.

5.

These spots offer a mix of shopping, cultural experiences, and local amenities, making Bus 23 a valuable route for both residents and visitors exploring Dubai.

Journey Experience

Taking the bus on route 23 from Oud Metha Bus Station to Al Nahda 1, DEWA, and back is a smooth yet slightly long journey. As the bus weaves through the bustling streets of Oud Metha and Al Nahda, you get to witness vibrant communities and residential hubs. Oud Metha itself is known for its cultural diversity, with places like the Wafi Mall and the Dubai Creek Park nearby, which are popular for family outings and evening walks.

On the way to Al Nahda, the area is dotted with a mix of modern apartments and commercial spaces, offering a blend of residential calmness and city hustle.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Al Nahda 1, DEWA, the furthest point on the Bus 23 route, starting from Oud Metha Bus Station · 7, with a price range of AED 36-43. This convenient service allows you to enjoy a seamless journey across Dubai, ensuring a comfortable ride to your destination. Whether you’re commuting for work or exploring the city, Careem provides a reliable and efficient option for reaching the end of the Bus 23 route.

This detailed guide to Bus 23 offers a comprehensive overview of the route, stops, and schedules, helping you navigate Dubai’s public transportation system with ease. Whether you’re traveling for work, shopping, or leisure, Bus 23 provides a reliable and affordable way to get around the city. With convenient stops and regular service throughout the day, it ensures a smooth travel experience for all passengers.

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 23, 2025.
